title: cotyledon repens
intro: Cotyledon repens, also known as a string of bananas or chain of hearts, is a species of succulent plant in the family Asclepiadaceae. The plant is known for its small, rounded leaves that grow in a chain-like pattern, giving it a unique appearance. The medicinal properties of Cotyledon repens include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of the plant include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and it can be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
